_comment: Public Finance Data — Master Manifest. Fetch this file first. Compare versions to cached local copies to determine what needs refreshing.
_migration_note: Schema 2.0 restructured all file paths. Consumers on schema 1.x must update their fetchManifest() to use new paths. See schema-changelog.md for migration details.

rates_annual.description: TSP limits, IRMAA tiers, IRA limits, SS bend points, pay cap, FERS parameters, federal tax brackets, planning assumption defaults
rates_annual.changelog_2026_2: Restructure: removed va and vgli sections (moved to federal/veterans-affairs/). No data values changed.

pay_tables.description: GS and DCIPS base pay tables — all grades, all steps, all OPM locality areas

dcips_pay_tables.description: DCIPS compensation: base GG grades, pay bands, LMS locality rates, TLMS supplements (STEM/Cyber, 780th MIB, Hawaii IT, Pilots, Polygraphers, Foreign Area)
dcips_pay_tables.changelog_2026_1: Initial release. Complete 2026 DCIPS pay structure with all TLMS categories.

va_compensation.description: VA disability compensation rates by rating with dependent additions, DIC rates, VA COLA
va_compensation.changelog_2026_1: Extracted from rates-annual.json during schema 2.0 restructure. All values unchanged.

vgli.description: Veterans Group Life Insurance age-banded premium table
vgli.changelog_2026: Extracted from rates-annual.json during schema 2.0 restructure. All values unchanged.

fehb_rates.description: FEHB program-level data: government contributions, weighted averages, premium trends, FEDVIP/PSHB overview

ss_taxable_max.description: Social Security taxable wage base history 1937–2026 (90 years)
ss_taxable_max.changelog_1_0: Initial release. Complete SSA contribution and benefit base history.

ss_bend_points.description: Social Security PIA formula bend points history 1979–2026 (48 years)
ss_bend_points.changelog_1_0: Initial release. Complete SSA bend point history for PIA calculations.

tsp_limits.description: TSP contribution limits history 1987–2026 (40 years) including catch-up and super catch-up
tsp_limits.changelog_1_0: Initial release. Complete TSP limit history with EGTRRA and SECURE 2.0 annotations.

ira_limits.description: IRA contribution limits 1975–2026 (52 years) with Roth income phase-outs by filing status (single, married joint, married separate)
ira_limits.changelog_2_0: Initial release. Includes full Roth income phase-out history by filing status (1998–2026).

state_benefits.description: State income tax treatment of federal retirement, property tax exemptions, and veteran-specific benefits by state

vrs_plans.description: Virginia Retirement System plan parameters: VRS Plan 1, Plan 2, Hybrid. Hire date auto-derive mapping.
vrs_plans.changelog_2_0_0: Split from plan-library.json during schema 2.0 restructure. VRS plans only. All values unchanged.

erfc_plans.description: ERFC supplemental pension parameters: Legacy, 2001 Tier 1, 2001 Tier 2. Fairfax County (FCPS) only.
erfc_plans.changelog_2_0_0: Split from plan-library.json during schema 2.0 restructure. ERFC plans only. Added jurisdiction metadata. All values unchanged.

plan_combinations.description: VRS + ERFC pension stacking patterns for Virginia

other_db_template.description: Generic defined benefit plan template for user-entered pension parameters

static_refs.description: SS Full Retirement Age table, IRS RMD Uniform Lifetime Table, OPM locality area codes
